summary: Implement SQL-escape helpers: esc(str|None), esc_array(list[str]|None) for Postgres text arrays, vec_to_pg(blob, dim) emitting pgvector text form with fixed precision

resolution.note: esc/esc_array/vec_to_pg added to scripts/export.py with a numpy-float32 round-trip. Unit asserts covering None, empty, quote/backslash edge cases, and dim-mismatch guard all pass. Precision fixed at 7 digits per value (float32 has ~7 significant decimal digits — more is wasted bytes).
